summary: Website project with admin panel and gallery section. Admin access is claimed via a 6-digit backend code (131104). Gallery section displays artwork with unlimited uploads and a 15MB max image size, manageable via the admin panel.
architectural_notes: Admin access is granted via a secret 6-digit code (131104) stored in the backend
Gallery image uploads have no count limit but a maximum file size of 15MB per image

existing_features.title: Update the AdminStatusBanner and admin claim flow in the AdminPanel to replace the current first-caller-wins "Claim Admin Access" button with a form that prompts for a 6-digit code. When the user submits the code, call the new `claimAdminWithCode` backend function. Show a success message on approval and a clear error message if the code is wrong or an admin already exists.

Add a Gallery section to the public portfolio page (`PortfolioPage.tsx`) that displays artwork images fetched from the backend. The section should be accessible via navigation, render images in a responsive masonry or grid layout, and support a lightbox/fullscreen view on click. This section should be distinct from the existing FeaturedProjects section and be labeled "Gallery" in the navigation.

Add a Gallery tab in the AdminPanel page that allows the admin to upload new artwork images and delete existing ones. The upload input must accept image files up to 15MB. Show a preview grid of all currently uploaded gallery images with individual delete buttons. Show clear error feedback if a file exceeds 15MB. This tab should only be accessible when the user is authenticated as admin.

new_feature_requests.summary: Register as admin using 6-digit unique code (131104) for permanent authorized admin access
Add a gallery section to display artwork on the website
Allow gallery images to be uploaded/managed from the admin panel with no limit on number of uploads and a max image size of 15MB

Add a backend function `claimAdminWithCode(code: Text) : async Result<Text, Text>` that accepts a 6-digit registration code. If the code matches the hardcoded value "131104" and no admin principal is registered yet, permanently register the caller's principal as the admin. If an admin is already registered, return an error. This replaces or extends the existing first-caller-wins admin initialization so that admin access is only granted when the correct code is provided.

Add backend support for a dedicated gallery collection. Implement `addGalleryImage(imageData: Blob, filename: Text, mimeType: Text) : async Result<Nat, Text>` and `getGalleryImages() : async [GalleryImage]` and `deleteGalleryImage(id: Nat) : async Result<(), Text>`. There must be no enforced limit on the number of gallery images. Each image must have an enforced maximum blob size of 15MB (15,728,640 bytes); uploads exceeding this size must return an error. Only the registered admin principal may add or delete gallery images.
